text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Tamamo Cross goes to karaoke with her
friends.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: C'mon! Da first song's gotta be "Osaka Parade"!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: As if! The obvious pick here is "Edo Ondo"!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo & Inari
text_block_list.text: Grrrrr!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you two are so cute when you're excited. ♪
If you get tired from singing, just say so. My lap
can be your pillow!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hm... What should I order off the menu?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Aw, geez. This one here couldn't care less about
any singin'...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Listen up, you two. There's plenty of places where
you can eat and sleep.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But you come to karaoke to sing and dance. Have
some sophistication!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You tell 'em! Singin' together's what makes
karaoke karaoke!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh my. Then will the two of you do a song
together for us?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hm? You two will sing together? I'd like to hear
that.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: No, dat's not what I was gettin' at...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Well, someone's gotta kick this party off.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Let's show 'em how it's done, eh? Come on!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Guess I've got no choice but to step up. Gimme a
mic!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: What da heck?! I was clearly the better singer!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Don't be crazy! You were just shoutin' the roof
down! I had the better skills!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I think it was wonderful seeing you two sing your
hearts out! ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I enjoyed it a lot. And I'm stuffed full...
We should come back sometime.
